features: Effective Exfoliation: African net sponge design creates rich lather and provides thorough exfoliation for healthier-looking skin with its unique mesh pattern

Durable Construction: Made of 100% nylon, the exfoliating bath net resists deformation and breakage even after repeated stretching and friction, with a longer lifespan than traditional loofahs and bath sponges
Easy Stretching: Stretches to approx. 114cm with excellent length and elasticity, easily reaching hard-to-clean areas like the back and soles—solving the hassle of traditional bath tools
Lightweight & Portable: Shower net easy to carry—fits effortlessly in luggage for travel, business trips or vacations, letting you enjoy a comfortable scrub anytime, anywhere
Easy Maintenance: Bath net spone quick-drying design prevents water retention, while the hanging loop allows for convenient storage between uses
Elegant Packaging: The exfoliating bath net comes in CORATED's exclusively designed, exquisite packaging—ideal for personal use or gifting
